gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/28)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/28)
text: الْمَرْأَةُ الْجَمِيلَةُ تَقْطَعُ الْبَلْغَمَ وَ الْمَرْأَةُ السَّوْءَاءُ تُهَيِّجُ الْمِرَّةَ السَّوْدَاءَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Abu Al Qasim, from his father,
(It has been narrated) raising it from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The beautiful woman cuts the phlegm and the terrible woman stirs the black bile’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn abu al-Qasim from his father in a marfu’ manner who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘A good looking woman cuts down phlegm and an ugly looking woman excites black bile.’”
